description: Built and shipped a series of consumer products demonstrating an early instinct for engaging, design-forward technology.
achievements: Founded Rekure, a mobile platform that lets sneaker enthusiasts identify, organize, and purchase sneakers — built around a wish-list-as-search-engine that finds any sneaker in a direct size.
Created the HaHa Davis iOS Messaging App — a sticker pack based on comedian HaHa Davis that became #1 in the App Store for three weeks straight, surpassing the movie Black Panther.
Launched Wallet Clicks, a digital business card platform reimagining everyday networking tools.
Sharpened product instincts and engineering range across iOS, web, and consumer marketplace mechanics.
